word: G4305 - προμεριμνάω - promerimnáō - prom-er-im-nah'-o - Take thought beforehand

sections.paragraph:
- Original: προμεριμνάω

- Transliteration: Promerimnao

- Phonetic: prom-er-im-nah'-o

- Definition:

1. to be anxious beforehand

- Origin: from G4253 and G3309

- TDNT entry: 13:49,6

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4253 and G3309; to care (anxiously) in advance: - take thought beforehand.
